response.step_by_step_log: I identified two songs from the video. The first, 'Prism Melody' (Hololive), was identified by the text in the corner at 00:00. The second, 'Show Them (Who You Are)' (Hololive ID), was identified by the text appearing on screen at 02:11. I searched for both songs, found their lyrics and translations. For the first song I used: 'Prism Melody Hololive Japanese and English lyrics'. For the second song, I used: 'Show Them (Who You Are) Hololive Indonesia and English lyrics'.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley featuring performances by Hololive virtual YouTubers, consisting of 'Prism Melody' and 'Show Them (Who You Are)'.

scenes.description: Group performance by various Hololive members.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
そうさ ずっと僕らの奇跡が
途切れないように歌うんだ
もっと高く！大きな声で
聴こえてた？何かが始まるサイン
集まって気づけば和音(コード)を奏でた
夢に見るだけじゃもう足りないでしょ？
キミを待ってる世界が
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Yes, our miracle will last forever
I'll sing it so it never ends
Higher! With a louder voice
Did you hear it? The sign that something is starting
We gathered together and before we knew it, we played a chord
Just dreaming isn't enough anymore, right?
The world is waiting for you

scenes.description: Group performance by Hololive Indonesia members with on-screen text for the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Won’t you just forget about the past?
Cause in time it will never matter
But the love we had, I’m hoping it will last
Bersama kita t’lah lewati tawa dan canda jadi memori
Pastikan artinya ‘kan cerahkanmu nanti
It’s time to show them who you are
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Won’t you just forget about the past?
Cause in time it will never matter
But the love we had, I’m hoping it will last
Together we've passed through laughter and joy becoming memories
Ensure that the meaning will brighten you later
It’s time to show them who you are
